---
title: "Advertising-Preference-Analysis"
author: "Zhibo Yang"
date: "2026-05-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)

Q_A <- read.csv("../Data/A_135.csv",
                fileEncoding = "GB18030",
                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

Q_B <- read.csv("../Data/B_135.csv",
                fileEncoding = "GB18030",
                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

Q_A <- Q_A %>%
  mutate(Group = "A")

Q_B <- Q_B %>%
  mutate(Group = "B")

data_all <- bind_rows(Q_A, Q_B)

data_all <- data_all %>%
  rename(
    ID = 序号,
    Gender = Q21,
    Age = Q22
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group),
    Gender = factor(Gender),
    Age = factor(Age)
  )

question_items <- paste0("Q", 1:20)

missing_summary <- data_all %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.))))

range_check <- data_all %>%
  summarise(across(
    all_of(question_items),
    list(
      min = ~ min(., na.rm = TRUE),
      max = ~ max(., na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  ))

duplicate_rows <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group, ID) %>%
  filter(n() > 1)

gender_table <- data_all %>%
  count(Group, Gender) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  mutate(
    Percent = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 2)
  )

age_table <- data_all %>%
  count(Group, Age) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  mutate(
    Percent = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 2)
  )

data_all <- data_all %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Total_Score = sum(c_across(all_of(question_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean_Score = mean(c_across(all_of(question_items)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

data_long <- data_all %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(question_items),
    names_to = "Question",
    values_to = "Score"
  )

item_mean_long <- data_long %>%
  group_by(Group, Question) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = round(mean(Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD = round(sd(Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    N = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

group_score_summary <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean_Total = round(mean(Total_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_Total = round(sd(Total_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Mean_Score = round(mean(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_Score = round(sd(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

item_t_tests <- data_long %>%
  group_by(Question) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_A = round(mean(Score[Group == "A"], na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Mean_B = round(mean(Score[Group == "B"], na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    p_value = round(t.test(Score ~ Group)$p.value, 4),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gender_score_summary <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group, Gender) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean_Score = round(mean(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_Score = round(sd(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

age_score_summary <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group, Age) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean_Score = round(mean(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_Score = round(sd(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

missing_summary
range_check
duplicate_rows
gender_table
age_table
group_score_summary
item_mean_long
item_t_tests
gender_score_summary
age_score_summary
```
